Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the rooftop planters with Aragaki...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}If these temperatures keep up, they'll probably get pretty big.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}That's probably enough fertilizer. The rest is up to the weather.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}
